name: Qwen-Max-0428
archDisplay: Proprietary Transformer; architecture and parameter count undisclosed. Announced (2024-05-11) as "a larger model" than Qwen1.5-110B, not stated to be built on it
note: Early proprietary Qwen-Max flagship, announced alongside Qwen1.5-110B as Alibaba's larger closed-weight model; entered Chatbot Arena top-10 at launch.
